jokes.text: Oh, I think I know what the problem is. What? Winter.
jokes.setup: Character offers to diagnose a serious car problem
jokes.punchline: Blames the entire season rather than mechanical issue
jokes.explanation: Excellent economy and misdirection - builds expectation of mechanical diagnosis, delivers absurdist oversimplification

jokes.text: It's a very simple choice, Latka. Either you have sex with me or you freeze to death. Sex. Death.
jokes.setup: Woman stranded with married man presents ultimatum
jokes.punchline: Reduces life-or-death decision to casual binary choice
jokes.explanation: Dark humor that establishes the episode's central conflict with efficient cringe comedy

jokes.text: Hmm.
jokes.setup: Given impossible choice between adultery and death
jokes.punchline: Long pause suggesting he's actually considering it
jokes.explanation: Perfect comedic pause - the humor is in what he doesn't say immediately

jokes.text: Why don't you tell me a little bit about yourself?
jokes.setup: Man facing life-threatening situation and adultery ultimatum
jokes.punchline: Treats it like a casual first date
jokes.explanation: Brilliant character moment - Latka's naive politeness in completely inappropriate context

jokes.text: Hi, honey. I'm home. Latka, I am so happy, I... You did it with another woman!
jokes.setup: Normal domestic greeting from loving wife
jokes.punchline: Instant psychic detection of infidelity mid-sentence
jokes.explanation: Perfect timing and character integration - establishes Simka's supernatural intuition about Latka

jokes.text: So, Simka must sin with someone Latka works with.
jokes.setup: Religious authority consulted about marital crisis
jokes.punchline: Prescribes more sin as the solution
jokes.explanation: Subversive religious logic - priest solving adultery with more adultery is genuinely absurd

jokes.text: You mean to tell me, you're going to sleep with one of my friends?
jokes.setup: Learning wife must commit adultery per religious law
jokes.punchline: Focuses on personal betrayal aspect rather than religious requirement
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Latka's skewed priorities in crisis

jokes.text: Baby, you're the greatest.
jokes.setup: Wife agrees to sleep with his coworkers
jokes.punchline: Treats it like she's doing him a favor
jokes.explanation: Perfect Latka character moment - completely missing the gravity of the situation

jokes.text: My little fool who has brought us to the brink of ruin.
jokes.setup: Wife watching sleeping husband tenderly
jokes.punchline: Affectionate term combined with harsh judgment
jokes.explanation: Nice character writing - loving exasperation in poetic language

jokes.text: What kind of slumber is this that... Don't worry. I am awake.
jokes.setup: Simka delivering dramatic soliloquy about his peaceful sleep
jokes.punchline: He's been listening the whole time
jokes.explanation: Good timing gag - deflates her dramatic monologue perfectly

jokes.text: But if it's Louie, will you still love me when I've lost my mind?
jokes.setup: Discussing which coworker she'll sleep with
jokes.punchline: Assumes Louie would literally drive her insane
jokes.explanation: Excellent character-specific humor - everyone knows Louie is that awful

jokes.text: I must debase myself with someone with arms of steel.
jokes.setup: Agreeing to sleep with Tony
jokes.punchline: Describes obligation in terms of his attractive qualities
jokes.explanation: Good juxtaposition of suffering with obvious attraction to Tony

jokes.text: Well, then you can look at this as a chance to get to know him better.
jokes.setup: Wife says Alex is a stranger to her
jokes.punchline: Husband suggests adultery as social opportunity
jokes.explanation: Perfect Latka naivety - treating adultery like a networking opportunity

jokes.text: You mean the way we elect our president?
jokes.setup: Simka explains their old country selection method
jokes.punchline: Latka thinks this is how America chooses presidents
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurdist moment - Latka's complete misunderstanding of American democracy

jokes.text: Watch out, Grandma.
jokes.setup: Louie fantasizing about driving in the blizzard
jokes.punchline: Imagines threatening elderly pedestrians
jokes.explanation: Pure Louie character moment - petty cruelty in his driving fantasy

jokes.text: With Nardo and Banta and Dancer and Prancer... Oh, excuse me. I'm a little giddy.
jokes.setup: Louie listing his drivers' names
jokes.punchline: Accidentally shifts into Santa's reindeer, catches himself
jokes.explanation: Nice wordplay catch - Louie's rare moment of self-awareness

jokes.text: Dress... is informal.
jokes.setup: Inviting everyone to important party
jokes.punchline: Awkward pause before mundane dress code detail
jokes.explanation: Awkward social moment - Latka's nervous energy leading to irrelevant details

jokes.text: Maybe no one will come, and then the priest will say that you don't have to go through with this.
jokes.setup: Latka hoping for a way out of the situation
jokes.punchline: Wants his party to fail so wife doesn't have to commit adultery
jokes.explanation: Good character contradiction - wanting social failure for moral salvation

jokes.text: Please be Louie. Please be Louie.
jokes.setup: Waiting to see who arrives last
jokes.punchline: Desperately hoping it's the most awful choice
jokes.explanation: Nice callback to earlier Louie fear - consistent character logic

jokes.text: Oh, the one, the good-looking one with the chest of granite is early, honey.
jokes.setup: Tony arrives early to the party
jokes.punchline: Simka immediately describes his attractive physical features
jokes.explanation: Consistent character attraction despite moral crisis

jokes.text: It's one of the few real occasions you get to be formal and ill at ease.
jokes.setup: Alex commenting on dinner parties
jokes.punchline: Describes social anxiety as the goal rather than side effect
jokes.explanation: Excellent observational humor - perfectly captures social dinner party reality

jokes.text: They sure make entertaining seem easy.
jokes.setup: Latka and Simka immediately kick everyone out
jokes.punchline: Alex's dry observation about their hosting skills
jokes.explanation: Perfect deadpan response to absurd social situation

jokes.text: American girls... That is the stuff. 'Watch out, baby, here we come!'
jokes.setup: Elaine suggests getting a new spiritual advisor
jokes.punchline: Simka's enthusiasm for American female independence
jokes.explanation: Nice cultural contrast moment - Simka admiring American attitude

jokes.text: What's Alex like?! Why are you shouting? I'm not shouting. Yes, you are; you said, 'What's Alex like?!'
jokes.setup: Simka asking casual question about Alex
jokes.punchline: Her desperation makes her accidentally yell, then denial
jokes.explanation: Good escalation comedy - Simka's anxiety breaking through her attempts to be casual

jokes.text: I'd say 'no' no matter what the truth was.
jokes.setup: Simka asking if Elaine slept with Alex
jokes.punchline: Elaine's honest admission about her dishonesty policy
jokes.explanation: Brilliant meta-humor - character acknowledging the impossibility of getting honest answer

jokes.text: I don't know, to the movies or to the gallows, maybe.
jokes.setup: Asked where she's going
jokes.punchline: Casual equivalence between entertainment and execution
jokes.explanation: Excellent dark humor - treating death as casual evening plan option

jokes.text: Talk is cheap. I want your body.
jokes.setup: Alex assumes she wants emotional support
jokes.punchline: Blunt statement of purely physical intention
jokes.explanation: Perfect economy and misdirection - cuts through social niceties with shocking directness

jokes.text: I just want to have sex with you, and then I'll run along.
jokes.setup: Simka trying to seduce Alex
jokes.punchline: Treats sex like a quick errand
jokes.explanation: Good cringe comedy - completely unromantic approach to seduction

jokes.text: See? Smooth, milky white... yours.
jokes.setup: Simka trying to seduce Alex
jokes.punchline: Awkward attempt at describing her skin seductively
jokes.explanation: Good cringe comedy from Simka's inexperience with seduction. Character-appropriate awkwardness.

jokes.text: Do I mock you because you do not eat animals with cloven hooves unless they chew their cud? No!
jokes.setup: Alex calls their religion barbaric
jokes.punchline: Simka fires back with specific kosher law knowledge
jokes.explanation: Excellent character moment - Simka's surprising knowledge used for comic effect

jokes.text: Now, peel me like a grape so I can get out of here.
jokes.setup: Simka finishing religious justification speech
jokes.punchline: Returns to crude seduction attempt with food metaphor
jokes.explanation: Outstanding line - bizarre food metaphor for seduction is both crude and poetic

jokes.text: You make me feel like a flying horse!
jokes.setup: Simka attempting seductive talk
jokes.punchline: Escalates through normal feelings to completely surreal
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurdist escalation - starts normal, ends with mythological creature. Pure comedy gold.

jokes.text: I have bad news for you, my darling. I have been faithful to you. Oh, no!
jokes.setup: Simka returns with news for Latka
jokes.punchline: Faithfulness is treated as terrible news
jokes.explanation: Perfect ironic reversal - virtue becomes vice in their twisted situation. Excellent writing.

jokes.text: Now this is where I get confused.
jokes.setup: Witnessing the complex religious/marital crisis
jokes.punchline: Jim thinks he's been following along until now
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jim character moment - his confusion has been building the entire episode

jokes.text: Why don't they just get married again?
jokes.setup: Complex religious divorce situation explained
jokes.punchline: Jim suggests obvious solution everyone missed
jokes.explanation: Brilliant resolution - Jim's simplicity cuts through all the elaborate religious complications

jokes.text: We must seek the Reverend Gorky right away!
jokes.setup: Jim's simple solution hits them
jokes.punchline: Latka treats obvious solution as urgent revelation
jokes.explanation: Good payoff - Latka's dramatic reaction to simple solution

jokes.text: Piece of cake.
jokes.setup: Everyone thanking Jim for solving complex crisis
jokes.punchline: Jim's casual dismissal of his brilliant insight
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jim moment - completely unaware of his genius insight

jokes.text: Piece of cake.
jokes.setup: After solving complex marital/religious crisis
jokes.punchline: Jim's casual assessment of the difficult situation
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jim moment - reducing complexity to simple terms. Great economy and character voice.
